song.title: Only A God Like You
song.author: Tommy Walker
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D Em7 C2 G D C2 D . G D For the praises of man . Em7 C2 I will never ever stand . G D For the kingdoms of this world . C2 D I’ll never give my heart away or shout my praise.|| . G D My allegiance and devotion, . Em7 C2 My heart's desire and all emotion . G D C2 D Go to serve the man who died upon that tree.
[C] .G D Bm7 Only a God like You . Em7 Could be worthy of my praise . C2 And all my hope and faith. . G D Bm7 To only a King of all kings . Em7 Will I bow my knee and sing .C2 Give my everything.
[B] . Am7 G/B C2 Em7 To only my Maker, my Father, my Savior . Am7 G/B C2 Em7 Redeemer, Restorer, Rebuilder, Rewarder. . Am7 C D G To only a God like You |Do I give my praise.
